$comment: Copy this file to <project>/.claude/local/plane.secret.json and replace the api_token value. The .claude/local/ folder is gitignored, AND secret-guard auto-blocks any *.secret.json basename — your token is doubly protected. Charter: docs/direction/2026-04-30-plane-integration-charter.md
$priority_note: If CLAUDE_PLUGIN_PLANE_TOKEN or PLANE_API_TOKEN env vars are set, they override this file. Useful for CI / one-off sessions.
$rotation_note: Set issued_at to the date you generated this token. SessionStart logs a warning when the token is older than 90 days (token rotation reminder).
note: Workspace API key from Plane Settings > API Tokens. Project-scoped tokens recommended.
